title: Provide advice on meal solutions in a meat retail outlet

elements.title: Promote meal ideas

pcs.text: Write meal suggestions to provide information on complimentary products, cooking techniques and costs.3.2 Hand write or type meal suggestions to customer and workplace requirements.3.3 Use correct names for cuisines.3.4 Write explanations on cuisines.3.5 .Use descriptive writing to promote the sale of meal ingredients items.3.6 Promote meal ingredients sold in the meat retail outlet through effective display techniques.
